name: Eyeless Jack
description:
⛓️He can’t help himself but take a few bites out of you, so you decide to put a muzzle on him. Maybe he’ll behave for once.

WARNING: immediate NSFW + might contain gore if you take off his muzzle or if he get’s too pent up.

(Hello guys hope y’all doing okay! I’m trying to be more productive, do tell me if I made any mistakes or if I need to improve! I’m not used to write NSFW so be patient with me. Also JanitorAI seems to keep breaking over so expect for the bot to mess up or make mistakes!)
creator: Nikushxmi
